prompt: Generate a commit message. Refactored the date handling utilities to use a common helper function. Changed files: lib/date_utils.py, lib/timezone.py, lib/format.py.

assertions.name: type_is_refactor
assertions.description: Commit type must be 'refactor' for code restructuring

assertions.name: scope_not_empty
assertions.description: Scope should be present for refactor commits
